write_file({"contents": "// Package language_tiers classifies programming languages into tiers that\n// determine which scoring and analysis rules are applied during certification.\npackage language_tiers\n\nimport \"strings\"\n\n// Tier represents the level of analysis support for a programming language.\ntype Tier int\n\nconst (\n\t// TierGeneric is the default tier for languages without native\n\t// tree-sitter grammar support. Generic-tier languages receive\n\t// conservative scoring and reduced rule sets.\n\tTierGeneric Tier = 0\n\n\t// TierNative is the tier for languages with full native tree-sitter\n\t// grammar support. Native-tier languages receive the complete set of\n\t// analysis rules and precise scoring.\n\tTierNative Tier = 1\n)\n\n// TierForLanguage returns the analysis [Tier] for the given language name.\n// The match is case-insensitive. Languages with native tree-sitter support\n// (go, typescript, python, rust) return [TierNative]; all others return\n// [TierGeneric].\nfunc TierForLanguage(lang string) Tier {\n\tswitch strings.ToLower(lang) {\n\tcase \"go\", \"typescript\", \"python\", \"rust\":\n\t\treturn TierNative\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn TierGeneric\n\t}\n}\n", "path": "internal/language_tiers/tiers.go"}) → wrote internal/language_tiers/tiers.go (1118 bytes)

write_file({"contents": "package language_tiers\n\nimport \"testing\"\n\nfunc TestTierForLanguage_Native(t *testing.T) {\n\tnative := []string{\"go\", \"Go\", \"GO\", \"typescript\", \"TypeScript\", \"TYPESCRIPT\",\n\t\t\"python\", \"Python\", \"PYTHON\", \"rust\", \"Rust\", \"RUST\"}\n\tfor _, lang := range native {\n\t\tgot := TierForLanguage(lang)\n\t\tif got != TierNative {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"TierForLanguage(%q) = %d, want %d (TierNative)\", lang, got, TierNative)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestTierForLanguage_Generic(t *testing.T) {\n\tgeneric := []string{\"javascript\", \"java\", \"c\", \"cpp\", \"ruby\", \"\", \"unknown\"}\n\tfor _, lang := range generic {\n\t\tgot := TierForLanguage(lang)\n\t\tif got != TierGeneric {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"TierForLanguage(%q) = %d, want %d (TierGeneric)\", lang, got, TierGeneric)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestTierConstants(t *testing.T) {\n\tif TierGeneric != 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"TierGeneric = %d, want 0\", TierGeneric)\n\t}\n\tif TierNative != 1 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"TierNative = %d, want 1\", TierNative)\n\t}\n}\n", "path": "internal/language_tiers/tiers_test.go"}) → wrote internal/language_tiers/tiers_test.go (915 bytes)
